title: Evaluate Boolean Expression
description: Evaluate expressions stored as rows. Each row has left_operand, operator, right_operand. Look up variable values and evaluate.
constraints: (left_operand, operator, right_operand) is the primary key of Expressions
name is the primary key of Variables
All variable names in Expressions are guaranteed to exist in Variables
value is an integer between 0 and 1000
key_concept: Multi-table JOIN with CASE WHEN to evaluate operators. Join Variables twice for left and right.

hints.L1: Join Variables twice (for left and right operand) to get their values. Use CASE WHEN operator='>' ...
hints.L2: JOIN Variables lv ON e.left_operand = lv.name JOIN Variables rv ON e.right_operand = rv.name. CASE WHEN ...
hints.L3: SELECT e.left_operand, e.operator, e.right_operand, CASE WHEN e.operator='>' AND lv.value>rv.value THEN 'true' WHEN e.operator='<' AND lv.value<rv.value THEN 'true' WHEN e.operator='=' AND lv.value=rv.value THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS value FROM Expressions e JOIN Variables lv ON e.left_operand=lv.name JOIN Variables rv ON e.right_operand=rv.name
